children.text: the applicable credit amount in effect under section 2010(c) which would apply if the donor died as of the end of the calendar year, reduced by
the sum of the amounts allowable as a credit to the individual under this section for all preceding calendar periods.

children.heading: Adjustment to credit for certain gifts made before 1977
children.label: b Adjustment to credit for certain gifts made before 1977
children.text: The amount allowable under subsection (a) shall be reduced by an amount equal to 20 percent of the aggregate amount allowed as a specific exemption under section 2521 (as in effect before its repeal by the Tax Reform Act of 1976) with respect to gifts made by the individual after .September 8, 1976

children.heading: Limitation based on amount of tax
children.label: c Limitation based on amount of tax
children.text: The amount of the credit allowed under subsection (a) for any calendar year shall not exceed the amount of the tax imposed by section 2501 for such calendar year.
